ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the commodity */,
  "commodity_type" TEXT /* Type of commodity (e.g., grain, oilseed, livestock) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity (e.g., bushels, tons, pounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., futures, spot, options) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Low price of the commodity */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* High price of the commodity */,
  "price_chg" TEXT /* Price change */,
  "basis" TEXT /* Basis */,
  "bid_chg" TEXT /* Bid change */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price data source */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., settlement, open, close) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES price_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the price data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the price data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of price data source (e.g., exchange, government agency, private company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_markets" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the commodity-market relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the commodity-market relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id", "market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "commodity_id", "market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news (e.g., market analysis, weather) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price forecast */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the price forecast */,
  "forecast_price" TEXT /* Forecasted price of the commodity */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the price forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "position_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading position */,
  "position_size" TEXT /* Size of the trading position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading position (e.g., long, short) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_positions_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_positions_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)
